title: plectranthus monostachyus subsp. lateriticola
intro: Plectranthus monostachyus subsp. lateriticola is a plant species native to southern Africa, belonging to the Lamiaceae family. This plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Plectranthus monostachyus subsp. lateriticola include its potential to treat various ailments, such as fever, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its ability to soothe skin irritations and wounds. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or topical applications, allowing for its medicinal properties to be utilized in various ways.
